scores.correctness_notes: Covers all major event categories with correct names. Includes all static events from the gold standard (install, start, stop, remove, config-changed, upgrade-charm, leader-elected, leader-settings-changed, update-status, collect-app-status, collect-unit-status, secret events, pre/post-series-upgrade) and all dynamic event patterns (relation, storage, container/pebble, action). Missing collect_metrics/add_metrics/meter_status_changed but those are deprecated/removed so omission is reasonable.
